# 要求新系統提供更高的三圍 (50% up)

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于7月17日18:25(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年7月31日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。

【更新内容】

问题修复

● 修复了「意识潜游」中，「永远的厄波扬斯」第一节「家族秘密」、第四节「当你不在」剧情音乐片段效果不正确的问题。
● 修复了「秘典书库」的广播剧「瘾」中剧情音乐片段效果不正确的问题。

***V2.5.2.4 Online Maintenance Announcement***

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on  July 17, 2026 at 18:25(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on July 31, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update Content]

Bug Fixes

● Fixed an issue in "Psyche Deepdive" where the Story music segment Effect was incorrect in Chapter 1 "Family Secret" and Chapter 4 "When You Were Gone" of "Ebwynnos Evermore".
● Fixed an issue where the Story music segment Effect was incorrect in the Radio Drama "Addiction" inside the Library.
